texto: It should make you shake and sweat,nightmare you, strand you in the desertof irrevocable desolation, the consequencesseared into the vein, no matter what adrenalinefeeds the muscle its courage, no matterwhat god shines down on you, no matterwhat crackling pain and angeryou carry in your fists, my friend,it should break your heart to kill.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Brian Turner sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “It should make you shake and sweat,nightmare you, strand you in the desertof irrevocable desolati…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, murder, regrets, útil em momentos de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
